title: Vintage Glass Jar With Lids 500ML Mason Jar with Reusable Straw Set of 2 Storage Jars Glass Mugs with Handle for Drinking Preserving Breakfast, Oats, Snack, Smoothie
features: Multiple Uses: Equipped with 2 aluminum cover pieces-1 straw cover piece enable you to enjoy the drinking with glass straw; 1 cover piece can be used as preverve jars; and used as a glass mug when without the lid.

Durable & Easy to Hold Jars: The rubber sealing ring on the straw cover piece can prevent leakage when drinking. Thickened glass on the body and handle ensure the durable and sturdy. Handle Design ensure the perfect grip.
Food Grade Material: BPA free, lead free, and is perfect for storage cold juice, oats,yogurt,cocktails,smoothies, Majitos, Water, Milk Shake, nuts, etc.
Easy to clean: Our wide mouth mason jar is equipped with an easy-to-use brush, which can easily clean your cups!

Package List： 2 * Mason Jars; 3 *Reusable Glass Straws (1 straight straw and 2 curved straws ), 1 * Cleaning Brush. Notes: stoves, dishwashers, and microwave ovens is not applicable. Do not put the jars in the freezer below 0℃ and do not add the boiled water.。
description: Still looking for jars can drinking outside and preseving the food at the same time? Our glass jars is a perfect choise for you! Why choose our drinking glass? 1. Versatile: with 2 aluminum cover pieces, you can drink with a staw when install the straw cover piece, you can preserve the food when change to another cover piece, and you can own a glass mug when use without the lid! 2. Healthy and Easy to Clean. Food grade material ensure the health. A free brush enable you clean the jars easily. 3. Creative design. Perfect for outdoor entertaining, BBQs, Party Favors, house parties or picnics and Weddings, suitable for coffee shop, Dessert Shops, home, office, bar, pub, perfect gift for Christmas. SPECIFICATION: Material: Glass and Aluminum Opening Diameter: 6.9cm； Body Diameter: 7.5cm; Height: 13.5cm. PACKAGE INCLUDES: 2 x Mason Jars; 3 x Reusable Glass Straws, 1 x Cleaning Brush ABOUT GLASSEAM: Our shop: Glasseam concentrate on glassware for decorating home office, coffee shop, and indoor garden, such as glass planter, glass vase, glass dome and glass ornament.
